title: Single-File Reach
objective: Replay growing pulse orders from three frontier reaches as fast and accurately as possible, keep your combo alive, and post the highest relay score before three relay breaks end the run.

controls.input: Tap the glowing reach nodes in the exact order they flashed
controls.outcome: Correct taps send the command onward and build combo

controls.input: Swipe across the center file when a split-order icon appears
controls.outcome: Branches the next pulse to a second reach and preserves the chain

controls.input: Press and hold on a node until the ring closes
controls.outcome: Stabilizes heavy commands and prevents a relay break

steps: A short pulse pattern plays on three stacked reach nodes with distinct tones.
The player replays the order on the same single vertical file before the beat timer expires.
Each cleared pattern adds one more pulse, speeds the tempo, and thickens the music.
Every few rounds, a single-file decree triggers: one reach becomes blocked, mirrored, or merged, forcing the player to rethink the next fewt
A wrong tap, missed hold, or timeout causes a relay break; three breaks end the run.
scoring: Score rises from each correct pulse and completed pattern. Combo increases a multiplier up to x8. Perfect rounds add a 'Far Reach' bonus. Handling a decree twist without mistakes grants a brief x2 surge, which is the key
tips: Listen first: each reach has its own pitch, so audio helps more than color at high speed.
When a reach is mirrored, replay that node's last two pulses in reverse order.
Use the twist bonus windows to push score; breaking combo matters more than playing fast for one round.

trendContext.title: Far Reach – Single-file browser 4X strategy game (no install, offline playable) – Medieval to space empires on three planets
